response:
# Cheaper QuickBooks Alternatives

## Free Options
- **Wave** – Invoicing, expense tracking, basic reporting (best free choice)
- **ZipBooks** – Free tier with limited features
- **Zoho Books** – Free for 1 user with up to 1,000 invoices/year

## Budget-Friendly ($0-$20/month)
- **Square Online** – Good for retail/service businesses
- **Freshbooks** – Starts around $15/month for freelancers
- **Stripe Billing** – Minimal fees, good for SaaS

## Mid-Range ($20-$50/month)
- **Xero** – Around $13-20/month; strong for UK/AU businesses
- **Zoho Books** – $20-$40/month paid tiers
- **Manager.io** – Desktop software, one-time fee option

## Specialized Alternatives
- **GnuCash** – Open-source, self-hosted, free
- **Invoice Ninja** – Invoice-focused, $10+/month
- **Wave** (for growth) – Free with add-ons available

## Key Considerations
- **Business size** – Solo freelancers vs. multi-user teams
- **Features needed** – Invoicing, payroll, inventory, forecasting
- **Integration requirements** – Bank connections, payment processors
- **Learning curve** – Some free options have steeper curves

**Best overall value:** Wave (free) or Zoho Books (affordable scaling)

What's your main use case?
